---
format:
  html:
    meta:
      viewport: "width=device-width, initial-scale=1"
    css: index.css
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <video autoplay muted loop playsinline id="bg-video" preload="metadata">
    <!-- lazy-load video poster and defer heavy video load -->
    <source src="vidtest.mp4" type="video/mp4">
  </video>
  <div class="overlay-text">
    <h1>Welcome</h1>
    <a class="cta-button" href="chain_link.qmd">Try ChainLink</a>
  </div>
</div>
<div style="height: 50vh;"></div>
```

# Stuff Under Here

Here is some content that sits beneath the full-screen video hero section. You can write markdown normally here—headings, text, lists, images, etc.
